TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: s'urux Kyoyibu qani, mtama mmrhu ciyal qa mwah klahang bawiq tqbaqan, gaga na Bunka ki SeziKyoyic, aring kya lga Kyoyibu san maha sinbalay lalu nya. In'ringan pinc'urx pplahang qa CwangFaminko, Pcpung tkbaqan-bu ga wayal inyugan lalu nya, snyan naha Kyoyibu Mubuy ktalan binah Canpyuta 教育部
S.PHON: s~ɕʔurux kjojiβu qani, mtama mmrħu ʦ~ʨijal qa mwaħ klaħaŋ βawiq tqβaqan, ɣaɣa na βunka ki s~ɕezikjojiʦ~ʨ, ariŋ kja lɣa kjojiβu s~ɕan maħa s~ɕinβalaj lalu nja. inʔriŋan pinʦ~ʨʔurx pplaħaŋ qa ʦ~ʨwaŋ*aminko, pʦ~ʨpuŋ tkβaqan-βu ɣa wajal injuɣan lalu nja, s~ɕnjan naħa kjojiβu muβuj ktalan βinaħ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ***
S.FORM: s'urux Kyoyibu qani, mtama mmrhu ciyal qa mwah klahang bawiq tqbaqan, gaga na Bunka ki SeziKyoyic, aring kya lga Kyoyibu san maha sinbalay lalu nya. In'ringan pinc'urx pplahang qa CwangFaminko, Pcpung tkbaqan-bu ga wayal inyugan lalu nya, snyan naha Kyoyibu Mubuy ktalan binah Canpyuta 教育部
S.PHON: s~ɕʔurux kjojiβu qani, mtama mmrħu ʦ~ʨijal qa mwaħ klaħaŋ βawiq tqβaqan, ɣaɣa na βunka ki s~ɕezikjojiʦ~ʨ, ariŋ kja lɣa kjojiβu s~ɕan maħa s~ɕinβalaj lalu nja. inʔriŋan pinʦ~ʨʔurx pplaħaŋ qa ʦ~ʨwaŋ*aminko, pʦ~ʨpuŋ tkβaqan-βu ɣa wajal injuɣan lalu nja, s~ɕnjan naħa kjojiβu muβuj ktalan βinaħ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ***
